nodes.title: An annotated heterogeneous ultrasound database
nodes.summary: Collect a large-scale public ultrasound database to improve AI-assisted ultrasound diagnosis performance.

nodes.title: EM-Net: Effective and morphology-aware network for skin lesion segmentation
nodes.scholarTitle: EM-Net: Effective and morphology-aware network for skin lesion segmentation
nodes.summary: Propose a high-precision model for skin lesion segmentation in dermoscopic images.

nodes.title: UltraGS: Real-Time Physically-Decoupled Gaussian Splatting for Ultrasound Novel View Synthesis
nodes.scholarTitle: UltraGS: Real-Time Physically-Decoupled Gaussian Splatting for Ultrasound Novel View Synthesis
nodes.summary: The first to apply 3DGS to generate new ultrasound perspectives.

nodes.title: Explicit and Implicit Representations in AI-based 3D Reconstruction for Radiology: A Systematic Review
nodes.scholarTitle: Explicit and Implicit Representations in AI-based 3D Reconstruction for Radiology: A Systematic Review
nodes.summary: Considering 3D radiological image reconstruction from explicit and implicit representations.

nodes.title: Federated Learning-Based Virtual Dual-Energy CT Generation from Single-Energy CT for Gout Detection
nodes.scholarTitle: Federated Learning-Based Virtual Dual-Energy CT Generation from Single-Energy CT for Gout Detection
nodes.summary: Introduces a federated learning framework for low-cost virtual DECT image generation to support accurate gout diagnosis.

nodes.title: Auto-US: An Agent for Ultrasound Video Diagnosis Using Video Classification Framework and LLMs
nodes.scholarTitle: Auto-US: An Agent for Ultrasound Video Diagnosis Using Video Classification Framework and LLMs
nodes.summary: The first multimodal ultrasound video diagnostic agent.

nodes.title: HyperWalker: Dynamic Hypergraph-Based Deep Diagnosis for Multi-Hop Clinical Modeling across EHR and X-Ray in Medical VLMs
nodes.scholarTitle: HyperWalker: Dynamic Hypergraph-Based Deep Diagnosis for Multi-Hop Clinical Modeling across EHR and X-Ray in Medical VLMs
nodes.summary: The first dynamic hypergraph-based deep diagnosis architecture for multimodal medical VLMs.

nodes.title: PET image reconstruction and PET image 3D perception (prior-image NeRF)
nodes.summary: Deep learning based PET reconstruction and 3D perception with prior images and NeRF.

nodes.title: 3D Gaussian model generation and rendering for low-dose PET image processing
nodes.summary: 3D Gaussian model generation and rendering for low-dose brain PET image quality enhancement.

nodes.title: DeepPET: An Intelligent Brain PET Device with Low Radiation and High Imaging Quality
nodes.summary: Integrate physical models with deep learning for efficient high-quality low-dose PET reconstruction.
